title: Signature Packaging Re-usable Plastic Cutlery, Heavy Duty Washable Utensils, Non Toxic Disposable for Food & Events - Cutlery Set, Pack Total of 150, 50 Each Knives, Forks and Spoons
features: HERITAGE STYLING – Re-usable extra strong plastic cutlery features coordinated dessert spoons, forks and knives, created for take-out, deliveries, hospitals, bbqs, corporate events, tea parties, picnic gatherings and organised food events.
QUALITY BUILD – Heavy duty construction offers durable performance for dessert service, camping meals and mixed essentials used repeatedly.
ECO-CREDENTIALS – Non toxic disposable cutlery set designed as washable utensils, supporting reduced waste through reuse at parties, catering functions and outdoor occasions.
FLEXIBLE PACK OPTIONS – Supplied in different sets including mixed set formats and packs 100, 150 and 300, allowing practical planning for small gatherings or large events.

VERSATILE FOOD SERVICE – Suitable for all hot and cold foods, soup, plated desserts and general dining, this reusable range supports indoor hosting and outdoor entertaining with consistent heritage appeal.
